sections.paragraph:
ἀνακυλίω pf. pass. ἀνακεκύλισμαι (κυλίω ‘roll along’; Alexis Com. 116, 7 [in Athen. 6, 237c]; Lucian, Luct. 8 al.) roll away of the stone at the grave Mk 16:4 v.l.—DELG s.v. κυλίνδω.

  1. pf. = perfect

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Alexis Com Alexis Com , IV/III b.c.—List 5

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 66
